title: rhododendron × knightianum
intro: Rhododendron × knightianum, also known as the Knight's Rhododendron, is a hybrid of the rhododendron family, specifically a cross between Rhododendron ponticum and Rhododendron luteum. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Rhododendron × knightianum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting respiratory health, among other uses. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of this plant are often made into infusions, teas, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
